movie.title: Bank Of Bhagyalakshmi (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Kannada] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: A crew of five amateur thieves reunite for one final score in a village brimming with elections. With no experience and only a reckless plan, things dont go as expected. Will they make it out, or will the village remember them only as five fools who gambled with fate?
